description: NinjaTrader 8 is running with the Control Center visible. Market data for SPY is available. A scalper needs to set up a Level II (Depth of Market) window to monitor the order book for SPY and place orders directly from the window. Open a Level II window for the 'SPY' instrument and ensure the Order Entry panel is visible. Save the workspace to persist this configuration. Login credentials (if asked): Docker / GymAnything123!
